titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Musa Ibn Al-Qasim Al-Bajali
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Musa Ibn Al-Qasim Al-Bajali

segments: ه عن موسى بن القاسم البجليّ فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن الفضل بن عامر؛ و أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى‌ عن موسى بن القاسم البجليّ‌.
arabic.text: ه عن موسى بن القاسم البجليّ فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن الفضل بن عامر؛ و أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى‌ عن موسى بن القاسم البجليّ‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Musa ibn Al-Qasim Al-Bajali has been transmitted by me from my father and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them both - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Al-Fadl ibn 'Amir and Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn 'Isa, from Musa ibn Al-Qasim Al-Bajali.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Musa ibn Al-Qasim Al-Bajali has been transmitted by me from my father and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them both - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Al-Fadl ibn 'Amir and Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn 'Isa, from Musa ibn Al-Qasim Al-Bajali.
